generated_oml:
instance EnablerEclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono messaging middleware that receives sensor events published by physical assets"
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceRealTimeMonitoringDashboard, ServiceSimulationAnalytics, 
                      ServiceAdaptiveLightingRLPlanning, ServiceControlLogicGeneration, 
                      ServiceThirdPartyAnalyticsAPI, ServiceBIMModelVisualization
]

instance EnablerEclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto digital twin platform that hosts device twin definitions and configuration files"
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceSimulationAnalytics, ServiceAdaptiveLightingRLPlanning, 
                      ServiceControlLogicGeneration, ServiceThirdPartyAnalyticsAPI
]

instance EnablerUnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 interactive visualization engine used for real‑time monitoring dashboards and 3‑D BIM model rendering"
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceRealTimeMonitoringDashboard, ServiceBIMModelVisualization
]

instance EnablerModelDrivenEngineeringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑driven engineering tools that automate extraction and transformation from BIM to runtime artefacts"
]

instance ActingComponentLightingControlDevice : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting control device defined within the enriched BIM model that can be commanded by the digital twin"
]

instance ActingComponentDimableLEDDriver : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Dimmable LED driver integrated into the lighting system, controllable via the digital twin’s action signals"
]

instance SensingComponentEnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor embedded in the living lab building that measures temperature, humidity, and air quality"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedEnvironmental
]

instance SensingComponentTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor embedded in the living lab building that reports indoor temperature in degrees Celsius"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedTemperature
]

instance SensingComponentIlluminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Illuminance sensor embedded in the living lab building that measures visible light levels in lux"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedIlluminance
]

instance SensingComponentOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor embedded in the living lab building that detects presence of occupants"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedOccupancy
]

instance SensingComponentModelTransformation : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Functional placeholder representing the model‑to‑model and model‑to‑text transformations performed by the engineering tools"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedTwinConfig
]

instance DataTransmittedEnvironmental : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensingComponentEnvironmentalSensor
]

instance DataTransmittedTemperature : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensingComponentTemperatureSensor
]

instance DataTransmittedIlluminance : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensingComponentIlluminanceSensor
]

instance DataTransmittedOccupancy : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensingComponentOccupancySensor
]

instance DataTransmittedTwinConfig : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensingComponentModelTransformation
]

instance DataEnvironmental : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime data stream of environmental sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedEnvironmental
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerEclipseHono
]

instance DataTemperature : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime data stream of temperature sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedTemperature
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerEclipseHono
]

instance DataIlluminance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime data stream of illuminance sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedIlluminance
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerEclipseHono
]

instance DataOccupancy : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime data stream of occupancy sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedOccupancy
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerEclipseHono
]

instance DataConfigFile : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Configuration file generated for the Ditto twin definitions and device registrations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedTwinConfig
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerEclipseDitto
]

instance ModelEnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched BIM model containing control semantics and middleware metadata (tenant and device IDs)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerModelDrivenEngineeringTools
]

instance ModelDittoTwinDefinition : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Ditto twin definition model creating device twin representations from the enriched BIM model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerEclipseDitto
]

instance ServiceRealTimeMonitoringDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboard leveraging Unreal Engine 5 to display energy consumption and lighting status"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightEnergyEfficiency, InsightComfortOptimization
]

instance ServiceBIMModelVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3‑D BIM model visualization rendered with Unreal Engine 5 for operational planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightBIMModelVisualization
]

instance ServiceSimulationAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and predictive analytics service performing energy and comfort optimization analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightEnergyEfficiency, InsightComfortOptimization
]

instance ServiceAdaptiveLightingRLPlanning : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning–based adaptive lighting planning service that generates lighting control decisions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionAdaptiveLightingDecision
]

instance ServiceControlLogicGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data‑driven control logic generation service that creates control routines from runtime analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionDataDrivenControlLogic, InsightControlLogicGenerated
]

instance ServiceThirdPartyAnalyticsAPI : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "API service exposing third‑party analytics dashboards and data queries"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightThirdPartyAnalytics
]

instance InsightEnergyEfficiency : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into real‑time energy efficiency of the building based on sensor and twin data"
]

instance InsightComfortOptimization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into occupant comfort levels derived from environmental and occupancy data streams"
]

instance InsightBIMModelVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight regarding 3‑D BIM model state and visual quality for planning purposes"
]

instance InsightControlLogicGenerated : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reflecting the control logic generated automatically by the twin system"
]

instance InsightThirdPartyAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight delivered through the third‑party analytics API"
]

instance ActionLightingControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual action to control lighting devices via the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActionAdaptiveLightingDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic lighting control decision generated by reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActionDataDrivenControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control logic applied to actuators in response to analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the DT are sent as Ditto twin update operations; through Eclipse Hono they are routed to the building control system, enabling the physical assets to react to DT‑driven decisions."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All sensor data and control messages are exchanged in real‑time, guaranteeing continuous synchronization between the physical and virtual models."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central DT framework (the “DT Framework”) acts as the hub for bidirectional data exchange between the physical building and the virtual twins, coordinating the various device twins and services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (BIM authoring), Construction (device configuration and comms mapping), Deployment (automated generation of runtime artifacts), Operation (live monitoring and control), Maintenance & Evolution (BIM updates → re‑deployment, policy changes, service upgrades)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT’s fidelity is assessed using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric; semantic drift is mitigated by continuous synchronization of BIM and runtime data, ensuring alignment between the digital and physical models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical devices publish data to and receive commands via Eclipse Hono; Ditto subscribes to these topics and serves twin updates; the DT thereby communicates through Hono’s messaging fabric, typically implemented over MQTT or a similar lightweight protocol."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT components (Ditto, Hono broker, and the Unreal Engine visualization) are deployed on a cloud/edge server; configuration is managed by the Hono/Ditto Configurator which orchestrates the deployment scripts."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM is used as the primary data model, providing a standardised, IFC‑compatible semantic backbone for the DT."
]
